name: Leaping Dolphin
subject: nature/ocean
prompt: a cheerful dolphin leaping above the water in a graceful arch, a curved sleek body, a smiling beak and friendly eye, a tall dorsal fin, splashing water droplets and a couple of gentle waves below

name: Smiling Sea Turtle
subject: nature/ocean
prompt: a happy sea turtle gliding through the water, a patterned domed shell, four wide flippers spread out as if swimming, a gentle smile and kind eyes, a few small bubbles rising around it

name: Curious Octopus
subject: nature/ocean
prompt: a friendly octopus with a big round head and large curious eyes, eight curling tentacles lined with rows of round suckers swirling in different directions, a few small bubbles drifting nearby

name: Coral Reef Scene
subject: nature/ocean
prompt: a busy underwater coral reef with branching and fan-shaped corals, swaying seaweed, several little fish weaving between the coral, a starfish on a rock, and small bubbles floating toward the surface

name: Friendly Whale
subject: nature/ocean
prompt: a big gentle humpback whale swimming through the water with a rounded body and wide tail flukes, long flippers, a small friendly eye, grooves along its throat, and a soft spout of water from its blowhole

name: Cute Clownfish
subject: nature/ocean
prompt: a single chubby cartoon clownfish with simple bold rounded stripes across its body, a small smiling mouth, big happy eyes, and gently flowing fins, drawn large and simple for little hands

name: Graceful Seahorse
subject: nature/ocean
prompt: an elegant seahorse curving its long coiled tail around a strand of seaweed, a horse-like head with a small snout, a ridged crest along its back, and a row of bony bumps down its curved body

name: Smiling Crab
subject: nature/ocean
prompt: a cheerful round crab standing on the sand, a wide oval shell, two big raised claws, four little legs on each side, two eyes on short stalks, a happy smile, and a couple of small seashells beside it

name: Friendly Shark
subject: nature/ocean
prompt: a friendly cartoon shark swimming forward with a streamlined body, a tall dorsal fin and side fins, a wide grinning mouth showing a row of small triangular teeth, a big eye, and a few bubbles trailing behind

name: Floating Jellyfish
subject: nature/ocean
prompt: a gentle jellyfish drifting upward with a smooth domed bell, a sweet little face, and many long wavy ruffled tentacles trailing below in flowing curves, surrounded by scattered small bubbles

name: Underwater Mermaid
subject: nature/ocean
prompt: a smiling mermaid swimming underwater with long flowing wavy hair, a scaly fish tail curving behind her, a shell top, her arms gracefully posed, surrounded by a few fish, seaweed, and rising bubbles

name: Octopus Eye Close-Up
subject: nature/ocean
prompt: an extreme close-up of an octopus face filling the frame, one enormous expressive eye, the rounded mantle above, and the tops of several thick tentacles curling in with detailed rows of round suckers
